callflow.title: Call flow integration
callflow.subtitle: Manage flow records and HTTP reaction rules for this organization.
callflow.failed: Could not save call flow data
callflow.rulesSubtitle: POST a URL when telephony events occur (simple HTTP actions).
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your PBX to CRMs, ERPs, chatbots, and other external systems.
integrations.pickOrg: Select an organization in the sidebar to load integrations.
integrations.emptyBody: Create your first integration to start sending PBX events to external systems.
integrations.createHint: Configure the external endpoint and the events that will trigger the notification.
integrations.fieldHeadersHint: One header per line in format: Name: value
integrations.flowsBody: Define visual flows with multiple action nodes for each telephony event.
integrations.webhooksBody: Configure fast HTTP notification endpoints per PBX event.
whatsapp.setupBody: The PBX whatsapp_gateway module is not connected. Follow the steps below.
whatsapp.setupStep1: Install the whatsapp_gateway module on the PBX and configure the phone number.
whatsapp.setupStep2: Set the PBX URL on the Companies page so the portal can reach it.
whatsapp.setupStep3: Once connected, the status will update here automatically.
aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.subtitle: Create agents with custom instructions that act in response to call events.
aiAgents.emptyBody: Create an AI agent to automatically respond to call events.
aiAgents.fieldPromptPlaceholder: You are a reception assistant. Answer calls professionally…
aiAgents.presetsHint: Pick a template below to pre-fill the form, or customize from scratch.
